title: Basic Input Validation
description: Implement basic input validation functions for strings and numbers with type guards.
requirements: Function isNonEmptyString(value: unknown): value is string
Function isPositiveNumber(value: unknown): value is number
Function isInRange(num: number, min: number, max: number): boolean
Type guards should narrow types correctly
Return false for invalid types (no exceptions)

few_shot_examples.prompt: Implement a type guard for non-empty strings.
